message:
bd-38d17: add Braille minimap overlay for diagram navigation

New mermaid_minimap module renders a scaled-down Braille preview of the full
diagram layout in a corner of the viewport. Includes viewport indicator
rectangle, node/edge rendering, configurable placement and colors. Toggle
with 'M' key in the showcase. 11 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
